curation_notes: Patch commit c58c5f5 fixes a single line in ext/stringio/stringio.c in the strio_unget_bytes function. The old expansion size calculation '(rest < 0 ? cl-pos : cl+rest)' was incorrect when rest >= 0 (position past string end), producing 'cl + pos - len' instead of the correct 'cl - len'. This caused the buffer to be incorrectly sized, allowing subsequent reads via StringIO.gets to return memory beyond the string boundary. The vulnerability class buffer-overflow (specifically buffer overread, CWE-126) matches the pre-assigned class. No sibling files exist — the entire C extension is a single file.
